extract: Munkidori (Japanese: マシマシラ Mashimashira) is a dual-type Poison/Psychic Legendary Pokémon introduced during Generation IX, in The Teal Mask. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. It is a member of Pecharunt's Loyal Three, along with Okidogi and Fezandipiti, and is associated with Ogerpon.
